name: io.github.Lore-Context/lore-context-mcp
title: Lore Context
description: Governed AI-agent memory, Evidence Ledger traces, evals, and portable context tools.

environmentVariables.name: LORE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Lore API that the MCP server should proxy tool calls to.

environmentVariables.name: LORE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Lore API key when the API is configured to require authentication.

environmentVariables.name: LORE_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: MCP stdio transport implementation. Use sdk unless debugging legacy JSON-RPC mode.
